svg.text: CROSS-BUILD HOST · three toolchains, one fat binary
BENCH RACK · six Macs on a shelf
One Ubuntu workstation orchestrates · the Lion mini cross-builds for PPC and benches itself · four PPC + two Intel Macs run timedemo

g.text: x86_64 Linux · the only machine touched directly
Macmini2,1 · 2.33 GHz Core 2 Duo · GMA 950 · OS X 10.7.5 Lion · Apple's last Mac with PPC-targeting GCC 4.0.1 in /usr/bin

text.tspan: runs the three sub-builds serially under flock, then

g.text: — stages .app with all six per-machine cfgs in Contents/Resources/, rsyncs to target
Each runs +timedemo demo<n>.dm2; qconsole.log returns to Ubuntu, parsed into a CSV row tagged with the commit hash
